start.message: Hello, thank you for calling JKYog. How would you like to support the temple?

make_donation.message: The temple operation depends on your generous donations...

sponsor_info.message: Donations can be made in the form of sponsorship...

recurring_donations.message: Recurring donations can be set up through jkyog.org.

tax_receipts.message: Please contact the temple office for tax receipts.

inactivity_handler.message: It looks like you're away. I'll end this donation session now.

end.message: Thank you for your interest in supporting JKYog.
